guard_city.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Firm and disciplined. Tone: authoritative and alert. Pacing: measured and clear.

dragon_boss.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Heavy and intimidating. Tone: menacing and controlled. Pacing: deliberate with short pauses.

merchant.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Lively and persuasive. Tone: friendly and opportunistic. Pacing: brisk and clear.

quest_giver_main.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Wise and grounded. Tone: calm and guiding. Pacing: steady with light pauses.

player.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Human and natural. Tone: focused and emotionally restrained. Pacing: steady and clear.

elder sophia.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Warm and wise. Tone: thoughtful and reassuring. Pacing: smooth with gentle pauses.
